content:
难得要把自己的Atom插件总结一下，免得以后去别的网站找插件配置，这个文章基本会一直记录我的atom。
# [atom-beautify](https://github.com/Glavin001/atom-beautify)
![image](https://i.github-camo.com/8f053415f4dfba4849d9bbe8327425d54511d94b/68747470733a2f2f636c6f75642e67697468756275736572636f6e74656e742e636f6d2f6173736574732f313838353333332f31363534323732382f64636163333730302d343038612d313165362d386533352d3963386663343433326564632e706e67)
代码美化- -，也就是帮你排版

---
# [atom-html-preview](https://atom.io/packages/atom-html-preview)

CTRL-SHIFT-H，开启实时预览HTML代码

---
# [autocomplete-paths](https://atom.io/packages/autocomplete-paths)
![autocomplete-paths](https://i.github-camo.com/7da86dc3d22c9dd1d1c47bcb36237720fd987764/687474703a2f2f73312e64697265637475706c6f61642e6e65742f696d616765732f3134303431312f70356b76696665362e676966)
自动加载引入模块

----

# [docblockr](https://atom.io/packages/docblockr)
![](https://i.github-camo.com/39f257a03de803c96a04d2dbf9d694da1aa9ed35/68747470733a2f2f7261772e67697468756275736572636f6e74656e742e636f6d2f4e696b68696c4b616c6967652f646f63626c6f636b722f6d61737465722f7265736f75726365732f747970652d68696e74696e672e676966)
自动生成注释

---
# [emmet](https://atom.io/packages/emmet)
国际通用html

----
# [file-icons](https://atom.io/packages/file-icons)
![Icon previews](https://i.github-camo.com/fb720dc73a9cf634fef9b11e87f0cd194284e3be/68747470733a2f2f7261772e67697468756275736572636f6e74656e742e636f6d2f66696c652d69636f6e732f61746f6d2f363731343730366632363865323537313030653033633965623532383139636239376164353730622f707265766965772e706e67)
文件带图标

---

# [git-plus](https://atom.io/packages/git-plus)
![A screenshot of your spankin' package](https://i.github-camo.com/78e2bafa5f9b3afdf47d7e02e3f949fea4801fc0/68747470733a2f2f7261772e67697468756275736572636f6e74656e742e636f6d2f616b6f6e77692f6769742d706c75732f6d61737465722f636f6d6d69742e676966)

使用git，我还是比较喜欢用命令行

---

# [highlight-selected](https://atom.io/packages/highlight-selected)
![Gif in action](https://i.github-camo.com/fb3c3e8f4170fc20047810e53cdfa1041f302a28/687474703a2f2f692e696d6775722e636f6d2f4335466e7a7a512e676966)

选中可以提示相同高亮，Xcode也有这个功能很喜欢

---

# [script](https://atom.io/packages/script)
# [script](https://atom.io/packages/script)
# [script](https://atom.io/packages/script)
![](https://i.github-camo.com/405fb492595dd819647af375b68c716fd862ee80/68747470733a2f2f636c6f75642e67697468756275736572636f6e74656e742e636f6d2f6173736574732f313639343035352f333232363230312f63343538616362632d663036372d313165332d383461302d6461323766653333346635652e676966)

重要说三遍，运行代码。 command+i 直接运行代码，不用启动chrome和node，贼66666
title: 我的 Atom 插件，有图
